Title format: <type>: <short description>
  - Types: feat | fix | chore | ci | docs | deps | refactor | test | perf | style | build | revert
  - Optional scope: feat(auth): add MSAL redirect handling
  - Multi-issue PRs: keep the type prefix; list each issue on its own `Fixes #N` line below.

Body format: keep the sections below. Put each `Fixes #N` line on its own line.
GitHub will auto-link and close the issue on merge.
-->

Add one `Fixes #N` line per issue this PR resolves.
Delete this section entirely if the PR is not tied to an issue

## Test plan

Step-by-step actions a tester can follow, with expected results.
Example:
  1. Sign in with a Business Central account.
  2. Open the Time Tracking page.
  3. **Expected:** today's entries load without errors.
  4. Add a new entry for project X, 30 minutes.
  5. **Expected:** entry appears in the list and totals update.
